name: Microchip Technology
analysis: MCHP has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at $93.6775. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry $93.6775, stop $84.4272, target $99.6000. Risk/reward is 0.64:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
